rationale: Section 11.111 governs exemptions for federal property used as transitional housing for the indigent. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b); no conflict arises.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit by ordinance or order may exempt from ad valorem taxation residential property owned by the United States or an agency of the United States and used to provide transitional housing for the indigent
_note: No overlap between proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase and §11.111 transitional housing exemption.
